behavior_summary: This script implements an egg-hatching cinematic/logic sequence. The process U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch guards whether a full U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch run should occur, marks the egg busy, runs camera/FX/sound steps, repeatedly spawns and animates a hatchling entity, checks spatial/centering and Z-height conditions, and ultimately clears the egg's id to mark completion.

The U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence uses small random delays and alternating SFX (U8P_AIRTEST1::func035F and urandom) and a movement/step computation routine (U8P_AIRTEST1::func0392) to vary intermediate behavior while a centering counter (local1) is accumulated.

A spawn helper (U8P_AIRTEST1::func0639) creates the visible newborn item, places it above the egg, sets its frame, and may destroy it if placement/timing conditions fail. When centering requirements are met (local1 passes a threshold and Z is sufficient) the sequence plays stronger FX (LightningBolt) and resets the egg id to 0 to finish.
notable_control_flow: Entry guard: U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch only runs the main cinematic when passedCenteredTest == false, passedWisdomTest == true, and Egg::getEggId(this) == 0.
At start the function sets Egg::setEggId(1) to mark the egg in-progress and closes UI (FREE::closeAllGumps) before spawning camera/FX helpers and suspending for short timers.

Iterative loop: the script repeatedly (randomized delays) spawns/updates a hatchling, runs U8P_AIRTEST1::func0392 to compute movement/timings, checks X/Y bounds to set a left-center flag (local4) or increment a centering counter (local1), and stops when local1 passes a threshold to mark passedCenteredTest = true.

Completion path: when centering+Z conditions are met the process plays multiple FX/SFX (including LightningBolt), then calls Egg::setEggId(0) to clear the busy state. Alternate/timeout paths still clear the egg id before ending.

Helpers: U8P_AIRTEST1::func035F is a short randomized SFX chooser; U8P_AIRTEST1::func0392 computes deltas, step sizes and may spawn Item::hurl when the item is out-of-bounds; U8P_AIRTEST1::func0639 creates/pops/frames/moves the hatchling.
open_questions: What exact numeric thresholds (e.g., local1 threshold, Z threshold 0x00A6) map to player-facing gameplay timing and how often the loop repeats in-world (frame/time conversion)? (confidence: low)
What external conditions set passedWisdomTest and when is passedCenteredTest persisted across game sessions or reset (global vs. per-egg scope)? (confidence: medium)
Are there additional failure/hurl consequences when Item::hurl is spawned (does it transfer the item off-map or cause player-visible loss)? (confidence: low)

main_function.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch
main_function.purpose: Drive the egg hatching cinematic and state transition: guard preconditions, mark the egg busy, run camera/FX/timed steps, spawn and animate the hatchling, test centering and height requirements, and clear the egg id on completion.
entry_conditions: passedCenteredTest == false (prevents re-running if center test already passed) (inferred)

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch
function_map.role: Orchestrates the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch cinematic, state guarding, looping centering logic, and final cleanup

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::func035F
function_map.role: Play one of two short U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch SFX variants chosen by a small random roll

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::func0392
function_map.role: Compute positional deltas, bucket vertical distance into step categories, produce movement/timing parameters and handle out-of-bounds path (spawn Item::hurl)

function_map.name: U8P_AIRTEST1::func0639
function_map.role: Create and position the hatchling item/entity above the egg, set its frame and move it into place (or destroy on timeout)

function_map.name: Egg::getEggId
function_map.role: Query egg id/state to determine if egg is free, assigned, or hatching

function_map.name: Egg::setEggId
function_map.role: Mark egg as busy (1) at start and reset (0) at completion; used as a local busy/lock flag

internal_calls.purpose: Play short U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch SFX variants during iterative U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch steps
Compute movement/timing/step parameters for the spawned hatchling and perform bounds/out-of-region handling
Spawn and position the visible hatchling entity used by the centering checks and animation

external_calls.purpose: Check if the egg is already assigned or in-progress before starting the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch cinematic
Set egg id to 1 to mark in-progress and later set to 0 to clear/complete hatching
Close UI overlays before running the cinematic
Spawn visual FX processes around the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch point throughout the cinematic
Spawn and wait on a prominent lightning visual effect during key moments
Anchor or move the camera relative to the avatar/egg during the cinematic
Read egg coordinates to compute deltas and vertical distance buckets
Spawn a hurl process when the item is detected outside allowed rectangular bounds (alternate off-region handling)
Create the hatchling entity, place it above the egg, set its display frame and move it into place
Destroy the spawned hatchling if it times out or placement fails

reads.name: passedWisdomTest
reads.likely_effect: Used as an entry precondition to permit the U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch cinematic

reads.name: passedCenteredTest
reads.likely_effect: Checked at entry to avoid re-running the full U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch sequence if centering already passed

reads.name: Egg::eggId (via Egg::getEggId)
reads.likely_effect: Read to determine if the egg is already marked busy/in-progress

writes.name: passedCenteredTest
writes.likely_effect: Set to true when centering counter and Z criteria are satisfied to prevent future repeat cinematics

writes.name: Egg::eggId (via Egg::setEggId)
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 at sequence start to reserve the egg and set to 0 at completion/cleanup

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements an egg-hatching cinematic/logic sequence. The process U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch guards whether a full U8P_AIRTEST1::hatch run should occur, marks the egg busy, runs camera/FX/sound steps, repeatedly spawns and animates a hatchling entity, checks spatial/centering and Z-height conditions, and ultimately clears the egg's id to mark completion.
